heading: Omitted
label: 564k Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which transferred to the tribe for collection all loans made from the reimbursable loan fund established by former , was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 732, § 1268 Stat. 721section 531 of this title
